phase.goal: Phase 01 (closed 2026-03-28): `.planning-archive` removed after migration into public docs; monorepo CLI baseline (`pnpm planning -- --version`, `engines.node >= 22`, documented `pnpm dlx` / workspace exec). Ongoing: keep `.planning/*.xml` aligned with section requirements/state/task-registry MDX; agents read root AGENTS.md first.

Phase 02: define and execute the shared data/storage provider contract so local SQLite plus local files stay first-class, Supabase becomes the first hosted backend for remote data and uploads, and the repo no longer depends on committed `.db` artifacts or Git LFS.

Phase 03: extract `@portfolio/repub-builder` into its own git-installable repo, vendor it back as a submodule workspace dependency, and turn the large-blob audit into explicit rules for what runtime artifacts move to storage/database while SSR-friendly public content stays deterministic.

Phase 04 (closed 2026-03-31): move the next public catalog surfaces behind SSR-safe Postgres metadata plus storage-backed files, starting with apps, project metadata, resumes, and public download assets. The owner-only auth shell and mounted Payload admin back office are now in place as the operational layer around those records.

Phase 05: land a cheap cross-project observability baseline for the public portfolio and Grime Time. Use Vercel Analytics for privacy-aware pageview tracking on public layouts, and add request-id based tracing plus safe request summaries for high-signal Grime Time form and copilot routes without logging raw PII payloads.

Phase 06 (active): Deprecate RepoPlanner — portfolio and monorepo adopt GAD-only workflows. Official React UI for planning lives in get-anything-done; replace embedded `repo-planner` package, remove `loop-cli` from root scripts (legacy shim until embed/init ported), archive upstream RepoPlanner repo. See `.planning/REPOPLANNER-TO-GAD-MIGRATION-GAPS.md`.

doc-flow.doc: Repo-root stub pointer only -- not canonical prose.
Stub for XML-only tools; points at documentation paths.
